scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && npx prisma generate
scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix backend & npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:windows: start cmd /k "cd backend && npm run dev" && start cmd /k "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.db:setup: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev && npm run db:seed
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
